title: heliotropium houstonii
intro: Heliotropium houstonii, also known as Texas false bindweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Heliotropium houstonii include reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory problems, and providing relief from digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
